text: Life's simple: You make choices and you don't look back.
author: Han quoting Gisele to Sean
note: Film: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift

text: Part of the process of change is to accept that there will be a part of us that needs to mourn. You can be grateful for the change while also grieving the way things were.
author: Philippa Perry
note: Book: The Book You Want Everyone You Love* To Read

text: to be cringe is to be free
